channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Chiefs owner 'honored' that Trump invited Super Bowl team that couldn't attend White House due to COVID
item.description: President Donald Trump said recently that he wants the 2019 Kansas City Chiefs to come to the White House after COVID-19 kept them from making the trip.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: NFL postpones a decision on the tush push but passes other rule changes
item.description: PALM BEACH, Fla. (AP) — A decision on the future of the tush push has been pushed until next month. NFL team owners had been set to vote Tuesday on Green Bay’s proposal to ban the play that’s helped the Philadelphia Eagles win one Super Bowl and reach another, but it was tabled until May.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Michigan basketball loses starting point guard after signing replacement in transfer portal
item.description: The Michigan Wolverines have landed North Carolina Tar Heels two-year starter Elliot Cadeau through the transfer portal, but they’re losing star guard Tre Donaldson in the process.
item.dc:creator: Brandon Carr, Local 4

item.title: At 89, Fred Costello plays the organ on opening day in Rochester just like he has since 1977
item.description: Fred Costello could swing a bat about as well as he could perform a melody as a kid growing up in Syracuse, New York.
item.dc:creator: Dan Gelston, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Maryland hires Texas A&M's Buzz Williams as basketball coach after Kevin Willard's departure
item.description: Maryland hired Buzz Williams as its men's basketball coach Tuesday, quickly moving on after Kevin Willard left the Terrapins to take the Villanova job. “It is an honor and privilege to be named the head coach of the University of Maryland men’s basketball team,” Williams said in a statement.
item.dc:creator: NOAH TRISTER, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: LPGA Tour takes center stage in Las Vegas as PGA Tour plots future return
item.description: LAS VEGAS (AP) — Reigning Player of the Year and world No. 1 Nelly Korda is back in the Las Vegas area this week to defend her T-Mobile Match Play title.
item.dc:creator: MARK ANDERSON, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Steelers owner Art Rooney II sees 'positive signs' that Aaron Rodgers will join the team
item.description: PALM BEACH, Fla. (AP) — Steelers owner Art Rooney II says there are “positive signs” that Aaron Rodgers will play in Pittsburgh. The four-time NFL MVP worked out recently with new Steelers wide receiver DK Metcalf after previously visiting the team.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: In recruiting battle, lawmakers weigh whether to give college athletes a tax break on NIL earnings
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — Illinois state Rep. Travis Weaver remembers how surreal it felt having Heisman Trophy winner Mark Ingram sit a few rows behind him in a political science class. He will never forget the pure joy in Alabama every time the Crimson Tide rolled to the national championship, either.
item.dc:creator: ANDREW SELIGMAN, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: All-Bay Area News Group boys basketball 2024-25: Meet the team
item.description: Oakland Tech’s ArDarius Grayson, De La Salle’s Alec Blair, Archbishop Riordan’s Jasir Rencher, Palo Alto’s Jorell Clark lead all-Bay Area News Group team
item.dc:creator: Nathan Canilao, The Mercury News

item.title: Lee Cummard named BYU women's basketball coach
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - BYU has named Lee Cummard as its next women's basketball head coach. Cummard has been the interim head coach since Amber Whiting resigned after three seasons on March 8.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: 2025 NASCAR Chicago Street Race: City, NASCAR announce traffic plan for before, during, after race weekend
item.description: CHICAGO — The City of Chicago and NASCAR officials have announced the traffic plan for the third NASCAR Chicago Street Race, scheduled for July 5-6 (Saturday and Sunday) in Grant Park.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Amalie Arena transforms for NCAA Women's Final Four
item.description: Amalie Arena is all about basketball for the next week, as the NCAA Women's Final Four takes over Tampa with events around the city.
item.dc:creator: Beth Rousseau, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Duke and Florida move on to Final Four
item.description: Florida and Duke won their regions on Saturday, with fellow top seeds Houston and Auburn set to play on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Mavericks outlast Bulls 120-119 to pad lead in play-in race
item.description: Klay Thompson scored 20 points, P.J. Washington had 19 and the Dallas Mavericks beat the Chicago Bulls 120-119 on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Golden Knights overcome Donato's hat trick to beat Blackhawks 5-3 for 5th straight win
item.description: Pavel Dorofeyev scored a power-play goal with 3:10 left to snap a tie, and the Vegas Golden Knights rallied for their fifth straight win, 5-3 over the Chicago Blackhawks on Friday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Utah HC loses to defending champs in OT, 2-1
item.description: SUNRISE, Fla. (AP) - Sam Bennett scored his second goal of the game off an assist from Brad Marchand at 4:18 of overtime to give the Florida Panthers a 2-1 win over the Utah Hockey Club at Amerant Bank Arena on Friday. By earning one point, Utah is now nine points behind St.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: 9th-inning homer lifts Rays over Rockies 3-2 in Steinbrenner Field opener
item.description: Rookie Kameron Misner led off the ninth inning with his first major league home run, giving Tampa Bay a 3-2 win over the Colorado Rockies on Friday as the Rays began their season of home games at Steinbrenner Field.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Gianna Kneepkens enters transfer portal
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Gianna Kneepkens, the leading scorer on the Utah women's basketball team has announced she is entering the transfer portal.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: NFL legend Randy White fights fentanyl after personal tragedy
item.description: Jesse Dempsey, a professional snowboarder, unknowingly took a pill laced with fentanyl, believing it was a prescribed painkiller for a knee injury.
item.dc:creator: Brian Dorman, NewsNation

item.title: SF's Chase Center hosting NCAA Men's Basketball games Thursday, Saturday
item.description: (BCN) -- San Francisco is hosting two games at Chase Center on Thursday in the NCAA Men's Basketball Championship tournament. At 4:39 p.m., University of Florida, which is the No. 1 seed in the West region of the tournament's bracket, plays No. 4 University of Maryland.
item.dc:creator: Bay City News, KRON4

item.title: Royal Riot Podcast Exclusive: Ariath Piol talks goals, red cards, and his journey to RSL
item.description: Royal Riot Podcast hosts Hayden and Mattey sit down with Ariath Piol in an exclusive interview where the player opens up about his journey to RSL, the emotions, lessons, and support he has received from the club and more.
item.dc:creator: Royal Riot Podcast, ABC 4

item.title: NCAA Tournament regionals: A look at Chicagoland connections, program history and more for the men's basketball Sweet 16
item.description: The 2025 NCAA Men's Basketball Tournament resumes Thursday night, and it's down to the Sweet 16. It'll be the Elite Eight after the regional semifinals on Thursday and Friday and then the Final Four after the regional finals on Saturday and Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Opening Day 2025: Cubs have a winning Opening Day record, featuring some memorable moments
item.description: CHICAGO — Opening Day is finally upon us. It's a day that comes with a sense of hope among baseball fans in early spring, a season that represents new beginnings often exemplified by the warmer temperatures and the blooming of trees and flowers.
item.dc:creator: Ethan Illers, WGN 9

item.title: Rail service to and from Petco Park expands for Padres season
item.description: The North County Transit District is expanding COASTER service to provide fans with a safe and convenient way to get to and from Petco Park on Padres game days.
item.dc:creator: Rhea Caoile, Fox 5

item.title: Softball: Poway 2, Patrick Henry 0
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI)- A gorgeous day to play softball on Monday afternoon with Patrick Henry hosting Poway. The Titans won a fantastic game 2-0 in 10 innings. Great pitching on both sides with Mya McGowan leading the way for Poway with a complete game shutout and adding 12 strikeouts.
item.dc:creator: Nick James, Fox 5

item.title: Russell Wilson is heading to the New York Giants, AP source says
item.description: Russell Wilson has agreed on a one-year contract with the New York Giants, a person with knowledge of the deal told The Associated Press.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, NewsNation
